_comment: Authored by Claude. News daemon polls these queries every cadence. Emits news_flash events ONLY when a headline contains ≥1 required keyword AND the URL hasn't been seen before AND the query's cooldown has elapsed. Claude updates this as thesis shifts.

queries.query: Iran US ceasefire deal Islamabad talks
queries.note: TUNED 2026-04-22 11:38 UTC — fixed-deadline binary REMOVED (4-source verification of Trump indefinite extension: Reuters/NYT/Detroit News/AJ). Dropped 'expire'/'expiry' (deadline passed, no new fixed). Added 'indefinite' (extension framing), 'ploy' (Iran's framing per Türkiye Today), 'bridge damage' (Tradewinds Apr 22 06:15 ship hit), 'Vance' (NYT Vance trip on hold), 'blockade lifted' (Iran's precondition per Express Tribune Apr 22 09:56), 'ship attacked'/'tanker' (Hormuz escalation). Watch for: formal Iran walkout, retaliation strike with US casualties, Vance trip restart, blockade-lift conditional.

TUNED 2026-04-22 18:55 UTC — REMOVED 'blockade'/'seized'/'fired' (all now baseline-state tokens matching stale CNBC/AP archives from Apr 13-16 original blockade announcement and Apr 20-21 Touska/MSC seizures already consumed). Added 'sunk', 'ablaze', 'missile' for fresh kinetic escalation rungs. Direct crude oil catalyst: forward-looking attacks/reopens only.

queries.query: US Iran naval Hormuz blockade retaliation
queries.note: RE-TUNED 2026-04-22 18:55 UTC — prior 'retaliation'/'retaliate'/'struck'/'escalation'/'mine' flooded 12 stale archive articles this tick: 10 Apr 13-14 original blockade-announcement (Algemeiner/Fox/Globe & Mail/MSN/etc.) + 1 Apr 16 CNBC 'fourth day' + 1 Apr 19 Il Sole Touska republish. Those keywords match 9-day-old routine coverage of baseline state. REMOVED broad keywords; kept only action-verbs describing NEW escalation rungs (missile launched, casualties, sunk, ablaze) + forward diplomatic names (Vance/Witkoff/Kushner/Islamabad) + de-escalation-trigger phrases (Hormuz reopen, blockade lifted, new talks, walkout). Cooldown 60→120min. If this still floods: add date-filter logic to daemon.
OPEC+ approved +206k bpd May. Any surprise supply move = WTI whipsaw. Emergency meeting possible under blockade.

queries.query: Bank of Japan yen intervention MoF Katayama
queries.note: MoF pain threshold tightened to 158 per FXEmpire/MUFG (Apr 16) — vs 160 prior. USDJPY 158.969 with session low 158.27 overnight on verbal intervention. Katayama-Bessent FX talks Apr 16 affirm 'bold action' option per Sept Japan-US FX agreement. BoJ Apr 27-28. Pre-intervention verbal signals at peak.

TUNED 2026-04-22 11:51 UTC — prior keywords 'cut'/'hike'/'hold' flooded 11 stale archive articles (Dec 2025-Mar 2026) this tick. Narrowed query+keywords to FOMC Apr 29 meeting and Powell statements only. Cooldown 120→180min. FOMC Apr 28-29 hold expected; oil shock could push dovish (growth risk) or hawkish (inflation). Re-broaden after meeting passes.

RE-TUNED 2026-04-21 07:38 UTC — prior keywords 'hike'/'shock'/'hawkish'/'dovish' still matched 10 stale archive articles (pub Dec 2025 — Mar 2026) this tick. Further narrowed to action/person specific. Market pricing May hike to 4.35%. Risk-off may force RBA to pause — AUD bid thesis broken under blockade.
26% tariff active — any deal progress reverses FII flow thesis.
